name: Vintage Terminal Ring
description: A single-color, high-contrast monochrome amber loop reminiscent of retro instrumentation displays.
css: .classic-amber { width: 36px; height: 36px; border: 3px solid rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15); border-top-color: #f59e0b; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-classic 0.8s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin-classic { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: System Emerald Pulse
description: Clean, steady enterprise green utility layout utilizing single-color scale steps.
css: .sys-emerald { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; } .sys-emerald span { width: 8px; height: 8px; background: #10b981; border-radius: 50%; animation: emerald-jump 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; } .sys-emerald span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .sys-emerald span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; } @keyframes emerald-jump { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.7); opacity: 0.4; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; } }

name: Ruby Segment Bar
description: Traditional single-color industrial processing layout composed of flat red blocks.
css: .ruby-bar { width: 80px; height: 6px; background: #fee2e2; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .ruby-fill { position: absolute; height: 100%; width: 35%; background: #ef4444; animation: ruby-slide 1.2s linear infinite; } @keyframes ruby-slide { 0% { left: -35%; } 100% { left: 100%; } }

name: Stark Cobalt Frame
description: A pure, single-color deep blue track geometric rotation design without accents.
css: .cobalt-stark { width: 32px; height: 32px; border: 4px solid #1d4ed8; border-right-color: transparent; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-classic 0.6s linear infinite; }

name: Monochrome Slate Block
description: Solid, dependable industrial dark slate square block mapping simple data rotations.
css: .slate-block { width: 24px; height: 24px; background: #475569; animation: slate-flip 1.2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes slate-flip { 0% { transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(0deg); } 50% { transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(180deg); } 100% { transform: perspective(100px) rotateX(180deg) rotateY(180deg); } }

name: Crimson Radar Node
description: Single-color warning beacon mimicking standard hardware diagnostic nodes.
css: .crimson-node { width: 20px; height: 20px; background: #dc2626; border-radius: 50%; animation: crimson-glow 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes crimson-glow { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0.5; } 50% { transform: scale(1.2); opacity: 1; } }

name: Classic Matrix Array
description: Multi-colored setup featuring a deep green cascading stream mixed with classic matrix style yellow markers.
css: .matrix-container { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .matrix-container span { width: 4px; height: 16px; border-radius: 1px; animation: matrix-drop 1s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .m-green { background: #22c55e; } .m-yellow { background: #eab308; animation-delay: -0.33s !important; } .matrix-container span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -0.66s; } @keyframes matrix-drop { 0% { transform: scaleY(0.3); opacity: 0.3; } 100% { transform: scaleY(1.3); opacity: 1; } }

name: Tri-Color Diagnostic
description: A textbook multi-colored status layout combining clean blue, amber, and red steps.
css: .classic-tri { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .classic-tri span { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; } .classic-tri span:nth-child(1) { background: #2563eb; animation: tri-bounce 0.9s ease-in-out infinite; } .classic-tri span:nth-child(2) { background: #f59e0b; animation: tri-bounce 0.9s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0.3s; } .classic-tri span:nth-child(3) { background: #ef4444; animation: tri-bounce 0.9s ease-in-out infinite; animation-delay: 0.6s; } @keyframes tri-bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 50% { transform: translateY(-8px); } }

name: Enterprise Segment Block
description: High-visibility multi-color system checker blending active teal and rich navy blocks.
css: .corp-mix { display: flex; gap: 4px; transform: rotate(45deg); animation: mix-spin 1.5s ease infinite; } .corp-mix div { width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 2px; } .c-teal { background: #0d9488; } .c-navy { background: #1e3a8a; } @keyframes mix-spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 50% { transform: rotate(180deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Arcade Magenta Step
description: Vibrant retro-style magenta single-color sequence highlighting execution pathways.
css: .arcade-mag { width: 32px; height: 16px; position: relative; } .arcade-mag div { position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 12px; background: #db2777; border-radius: 2px; animation: mag-shift 0.8s linear infinite alternate; } .arcade-mag div:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -0.4s; } @keyframes mag-shift { 0% { left: 0px; } 100% { left: 20px; } }
